name: socialforge
description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing (brand assets are sacred, AI is the creative layer around them), AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation, human-in-the-loop review galleries, and C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance. 16 skills, 25 commands, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors (opt-in). Four creative modes (ANCHOR_COMPOSE / ENHANCE_EXTEND / STYLE_REFERENCED / PURE_CREATIVE). v1.9.0 (2026-05-27): native Antigravity manifest at repo root (replaces the invented .antigravity/plugin.json that was correctly removed in v1.8.5). Same skills/ directory shared with .claude-plugin/ and .codex-plugin/ (Agent Skills open standard).
